visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a handheld close-up shot of a person's inner forearm. Visible on the skin are deep red circular indentations and thin lines, suggesting pressure from tight straps. The background is a dimly lit indoor space with a blurred white and yellow patterned fabric. (2) The scene cuts to a first-person perspective inside a brightly lit retail store. A hand is seen holding a large white shopping bag with 'OLIVE YOUNG' and 'Sanrio' branding, featuring a Hello Kitty character. The background shows blurred aisles filled with personal care products. (3) The perspective shifts to a low-angle shot showing both arms of the subject. Multiple white and green plastic bag handles are looped around the forearms, pulling tightly against the skin. The setting is a doorway or corner with vertical panels. (4) A rapid montage follows: a refrigerated shelf in a convenience store packed with beverage cans including brands like PEACEMINUSONE; a medium close-up of a young woman's face showing a surprised and excited expression while holding a red can; and finally, an outdoor nighttime shot of the woman smiling and holding a green 'Nice to' shopping bag.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV. [Slogan]: 🇰🇷 只要去韓國都會得到的傷痕. [Subtitle]: Reasons why people often get scars while traveling in Korea. (2) [Logo]: OLIVE YOUNG x Sanrio. (3) [Slogan]: POV. [Slogan]: 🇰🇷 只要去韓國都會得到的傷痕. [Subtitle]: Reasons why people often get scars while traveling in Korea. (6) [Variety]: 女生請注意! ⚠️. (8) [Subtitle]: 有沒有治療法🥲.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character appearing in selfie shots and close-ups of her arms.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair and makeup, wearing a light-colored top and a denim-like skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior, a brightly lit Olive Young retail store with crowded product shelves, a convenience store refrigerated display, and an urban street at night with neon lights and signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Brazilian Funk (Phonk) music begins immediately, featuring a distorted, heavy electronic bassline and a sharp, repetitive kick-and-snare rhythm. A female vocal sounds intermittently, singing rhythmic Portuguese phrases with a dry, processed texture. (2) The track maintains its driving tempo and percussive density. The spectral brightness is high due to the sharp transients of the electronic drums. No background speech or environmental noise is heard; the audio is a clean studio track. (3) The rhythmic pattern continues without variation, providing a consistent, high-arousal acoustic backdrop. The female vocal loops with the same intensity until the end of the segment, reinforcing the high-energy, trend-like production style.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous, trend-driven narrative to showcase the physical 'consequences' (red marks on the arm) of a heavy shopping spree in Korea. By showing the marks first and then the shopping activity, it creates a relatable 'POV' experience for travelers who over-buy at stores like Olive Young.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent featuring of Olive Young shopping bags, specific Hello Kitty collaboration merchandise, and Close-up shots of Peace Minus One beverage cans.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media 'POV' trend, relying on upbeat music and relatable physical comedy to engage viewers interested in Korean travel and shopping.
